title: Clientside Improved Server Experience
description: A big pack of mods to improve your server experience (and also single player!). Adds sound mods, QoL tweaks, a few shaders and more!
body:
Note: None of the mods inside this pack were created by me. I packed them all into one modpack for convenience of those who would otherwise download these one by one and waste a lot of time doing so. You can visit each mod page through the Mod Menu inside the game.

I created this modpack for those who want to play on servers but have a streamlined and efficient experience. Mods like Client Harvesting and Mouse Wheelie make it possible to right click harvest crops and automatically refill broken tools in the hotbar.

Sodium and Iris allow for insanely good performance with shaders while Ferrite Core reduces ram usage, less lag spikes being the result. Noisium increases the world loading speed by 30 percent or more.

Client Tweaks, Crafting Tweaks and Mouse Tweaks do anything from keeping you from accidentally placing torches in your offhand while eating, to making it possible to mass produce charcoal blocks faster than ever!

There's a bunch of other mods in here that also improve aspects of the game play and make the world a more interesting and immersive one. I like sound mods a lot, I've added mods like Charmonium, Dynamic Surroundings and Ambient Sounds to add anything from waves crashing to birds chirping :D
There's also three great shaders, two are gorgeous and quite popular (Bliss & Complementary), the third is the poor man's shader (MakeUp Ultrafast). It gives great performance with very nice visuals for how much FPS you can get.

For those who aren't planning on using shaders and have an Nvidia GPU, get Nvidium for a massive performance boost! It's worth it and will make your computer run a bit quieter.

Also before you go and do any serious gameplay, tweak the config for Client Tweaks so that you don't get frustrated if it's not working how you want it. I set the mod to act like I wanted it to, it may not suit your playing style.
